title: Randomized Blocks
description: Blocks drop random items, including modded items.
body:
### Randomized Blocks

**The Randomized Blocks mod is a fun mod that is compatible with any mod and vanilla items! Breaking any block will give it a random drop instead! Keeping the gameplay exciting and unpredictable.**

### Key Features:

- Randomized Blocks: Players receive random drops from breaking blocks, including modding items.
- Commands: Use the /randomizeblocks command to rerandomize the block drops you MUST be OPERATOR to use the command.
- Mod Compatibility: This mod is fully compatible with other mods, integrating all custom items into the random drop pool for a truly diverse experience.

Feel free to use this mod in modpacks please just give credit! You can also create youtube videos just please link the curseforge/modrinth page!



### If you need to contact me @themattias is my discord.
